title: lamium ponticum subsp. ponticum
intro: Lamium ponticum subsp. ponticum, also known as Pontic deadnettle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Turkey and Bulgaria. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lamium ponticum subsp. ponticum include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and improve respiratory function, making it a valuable herb for those suffering from asthma and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically to the skin as a salve or ointment.
